---
title: Basic Render Test
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ["<!DOCTYPE html>", "<title>Basic Render Test</title>", "This is a test paragraph"]
        - ["ERROR", "FATAL"]
---

This is a test paragraph.

## A Heading

Some more content here.
